g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the client app do on startup?')
sendPrompt('How does the client read the local license cache?')
sendPrompt('What is checked in the local cache validation?')
sendPrompt('What data does the client send in the activation request?')
sendPrompt('What does the server check when validating a license?')
sendPrompt('How does seat count enforcement work?')
sendPrompt('What does the server write to AUDIT_LOG and LICENSE_ACTIVATION?')
sendPrompt('What does the client store in the local cache after a successful activation?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the license is denied?')
sendPrompt('What should the app show when the license is denied or expired?')
